Author: EchoVaultDev
Name: Echo
Description: Records players you encounter and syncs them to the EchoVault community index. Browse at echovault.gg.
Punchline: See the players you have crossed paths with.
Changelog:
### Added
- Plugin installer icon.
- echovault.gg links now show a preview card when shared in Discord.
- You can generate and copy your website claim code straight from the settings window.
- The claim page explains what to do if your character is on the free trial.
- Release notes now show up in the plugin installer and get posted to Discord.

### Changed
- Profiles fill in faster after you first run into someone.
- Claim codes unlock after 1 day of account age instead of 7. Still needs 10 players seen.
- Asking for a claim code too early now shows how far along you are, rather than handing out a code that won't work yet.

### Fixed
- Sightings across very large zones were getting rejected as implausible.
- Claim errors on the website now tell you what actually went wrong.
- Names typed with curly apostrophes (phone and Mac keyboards) now match when claiming.
- Claim checks no longer fail with a generic error when the Lodestone is busy; your code stays valid.
- Claim and character verification don't wait behind background Lodestone lookups anymore.
- Fixed a case where a character's home world was recorded wrong, making them unclaimable.
